steps.title: Use the no-solution condition
steps.content: A system of two linear equations has no solution when the lines are parallel: same slope, different $y$-intercepts.

steps.title: Rewrite the given line
steps.content:
Move all terms except the constant to the left.
$$y=4x+12$$
$$-4x+y=12$$

steps.title: Choose the parallel line
steps.content: A parallel distinct line keeps the same left side but changes the constant, giving $-4x+y=15$. The answer is B.
